PRIVACY ▸ VAULT STATUS CRYPTO ● SEALED · v1.0
Privacy Policy

Your data.
Your call.

Short version: we collect the minimum, we don't sell it, we don't share it, and you can delete it anytime. Here's the full story — plainly, with no legal hand-waving.

●Effective · Jan 29, 2026 ●Last updated · Jan 29, 2026 ●8 sections ●Plain language
Jump to 01 · What we collect 02 · How we use it 03 · Storage & security 04 · Your rights 05 · Retention 06 · Children's privacy 07 · Policy changes 08 · Contact
01 / COLLECTION ▸ DATA INPUTS STATUS ● ACTIVE · v1.0

What we collect.

●The minimum needed to make the app work for you.

PulseKegel is designed to gather as little personal data as possible. We only collect what's directly required to personalize your training and keep the app running. Here's the complete list.

  • First name Used for personalization inside the app — greetings, progress screens, and session headers. Not required if you'd rather stay anonymous. You can use any name you like.
  • Anatomy type Used to tailor exercises, cues, and progress targets to your body. This is the only clinically relevant input — it shapes what the app recommends.
  • App usage data Session counts, streaks, and completion state — stored so your progress follows you across devices. Aggregated, never tied to ads or third-party profiling.
What we don't collect

We don't ask for your last name, birthdate, address, phone number, medical history, or payment details beyond what Apple handles on its side. We don't track your location. We don't read your contacts. We don't use fingerprinting or advertising identifiers.

02 / USAGE ▸ INTENDED PURPOSE SCOPE ● NARROW · v1.0

How we use it.

●Training the app. Nothing else.

Your data has one job: making the app work better for you. We use the information we collect solely for:

  • Personalizing your app experience — greetings, streaks, and progress displays
  • Providing relevant content and features based on your anatomy type
  • Improving app functionality, fixing bugs, and refining recommendations over time
  • Sending service messages if something material changes (rare, and always relevant)
We do not

Sell your information. Rent it. Share it with data brokers. Use it to train third-party advertising models. Package it for analytics resale. Combine it with data from other apps. Send it anywhere it doesn't need to go.

03 / STORAGE ▸ SECURITY POSTURE CRYPTO ● SEALED · v1.0

Storage & security.

●Encrypted at rest. Encrypted in transit.

Your data is stored securely — on your device and on our servers — using industry-standard security measures: encryption at rest, encrypted transport (TLS), strict access controls, and infrastructure hosted with reputable cloud providers that meet modern compliance baselines.

We do not share, sell, or distribute your personal information to third parties. Service providers that help us run the app (e.g. hosting) only handle data under contract, only for the purpose of providing that service, and never for their own purposes.

Breach honesty

No system is perfectly secure. If something ever happens that affects your data, we'll tell you quickly and clearly — not weeks later, not buried in legalese.

04 / RIGHTS ▸ CONTROL VECTORS ACCESS ● GRANTED · v1.0

Your rights.

●Four levers, always available.

Your data belongs to you. You can use any of the following at any time — no questions, no friction.

● RIGHT 01

Delete anytime

Wipe your data from inside the app in a few taps. Deletion is permanent and propagates to our servers.

● RIGHT 02

Access your info

Request a copy of everything we have on file. We'll send it back in a readable format, not a wall of JSON.

● RIGHT 03

Portable export

Want to take your data elsewhere? We'll provide it in a standard, machine-readable format you can actually use.

● RIGHT 04

Correct or restrict

Fix anything that's wrong, pause processing, or tell us to stop — we'll honor it and confirm in writing.

05 / RETENTION ▸ LIFECYCLE PURGE ● ON-DEMAND · v1.0

Data retention.

●Only as long as we need to.

We retain your information only as long as necessary to provide the service — which, in practice, means as long as you have an active account.

When you delete your data (or your account), it's permanently removed from our systems. Backups roll off on a scheduled cadence so old snapshots don't linger indefinitely.

06 / MINORS ▸ AGE GATE POLICY ● ENFORCED · v1.0

Children's privacy.

●Not built for kids. Full stop.

PulseKegel is not intended for children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from minors. If we learn we've received data from a child, we'll delete it promptly.

If you're a parent or guardian and believe your child has given us information, email info@pulsekegel.com — we'll take care of it.

07 / CHANGES ▸ VERSION CONTROL CHANGELOG ● PUBLIC · v1.0

Changes to this policy.

●Material changes, clear heads-up.

We may update this policy as the app evolves or as regulations change. When we do, we'll bump the Last updated date at the top of this page.

If a change is material — anything that meaningfully affects how your data is handled — we'll notify you directly, through the app or by email, before it takes effect. You'll always have the option to review and opt out.

08 · Contact

Questions?
We actually read these.

If anything in this policy is unclear, or you want to exercise any of the rights above, write to us. A real person will get back to you.

WRITE TO info@pulsekegel.com
PulseKegel

Private, evidence-based pelvic floor training. Built for the one muscle nobody talks about.
